title: 3/31/20 Turn comments back on FOR KIDS

transcript.text: Living in Boulder, V-Log, March 31st, 2020, Tuesday, 8.32 p.m.
A.m.
I just, I went into the store, like, a little bit ago to get food,
But they have a rule that says that between 7 and 10 in the morning,
It's only for old people, so.
I did drive through over at Dunkin' Donuts and got a latte and a sandwich.
And now I think I'm going to go and do my exercising.
I'm going to swim on my machine, and then I'm going to ride.
Yesterday I swam 2 kilometers in 2 sections of 1 kilometer.
I did on level 7 for the first kilometer and then level 6.
Then I basically got bored with it.
My shoulders were kind of sore, so.
Started up slowly, and then I got on the bike,
And I rode the bike in, like, 4 different sections.
I get up and it gets high and ended up going, like, 65 miles,
So before I kind of got bored.
I'm kind of picking it up really slowly because I'm smoking way too much weed.
I bought that weed to work on my website.
But now I was like, wait, no, I'm doing athlete now, so.
Yeah, I should, I just gave a little bit to my roommate yesterday.
I should give him a rest or a lot of it today.
Okay, so, yeah, I just got really stoned.
I'm really high right now.
I'm going to go swim.
I think I'm going to put it on level 7.
Listen to music.
And then ride, and we'll see.
When I get hungry, I'll just pop a can of something in me.
A can of beans or something.
I have my goos.
I have, like, 15 goos or something from last year,
But they still taste fresh, so.
They preserve well past the due date.
Way past the due date.
And that's what I eat during the day, so, yeah.
Let's see, what's my prediction?
I'd say 2 to 4 kilometers on the swim machine, followed by maybe 50 miles.
I could do up to 100.
Depends on my mood.
That's all it is, really.
And I'm just going to listen to music, I think.
I should watch, like, triathlon videos on YouTube.
I didn't do that last time.
I wasn't really listening to anything, just music and having my head down.
And, yeah.
Okay, so, talk to you tomorrow.
